home.aboutSubtitle: Software Engineer building scalable web systems and data-driven applications.
home.aboutDescription: I'm a software engineer based in Colombia focused on building reliable systems and web applications that solve real problems. I enjoy analyzing complex systems, improving processes, and transforming ideas into functional software.

webDevelopment.title: Institutional Web Platforms
webDevelopment.subtitle: End-to-end web development for corporate clients
webDevelopment.overview: Designed, developed, and deployed multiple institutional websites with integrated APIs, SEO optimization, and content management systems.
webDevelopment.problem: Clients needed modern, fast-loading websites that could be easily updated by non-technical staff while maintaining high search engine rankings.
webDevelopment.solution: Built responsive websites using modern frameworks with custom CMS integration, implemented server-side rendering for SEO, and deployed with automated CI/CD pipelines.
webDevelopment.role: Full-stack developer responsible for design, development, deployment, and client training. Led requirements gathering through final delivery.

backupAutomation.title: Accounting Systems Backup Automation
backupAutomation.subtitle: Automated backup solution for critical financial data
backupAutomation.overview: Developed automated backup system for accounting software ensuring data integrity and disaster recovery capabilities.
backupAutomation.problem: Manual backup processes were time-consuming, error-prone, and lacked verification. Data loss risk was unacceptable for financial systems.
backupAutomation.solution: Created custom PowerShell/Bash scripts with automated scheduling, integrity verification checks, and comprehensive logging. Implemented encrypted off-site storage.
backupAutomation.role: Solo developer - designed architecture, wrote scripts, configured scheduling, and established recovery procedures.

securityImplementation.title: Corporate Network Security
securityImplementation.subtitle: Security infrastructure for enterprise network
securityImplementation.overview: Designed and implemented comprehensive security policies and infrastructure for corporate network protection.
securityImplementation.problem: Network lacked documented security policies, exposing the organization to data breaches and compliance risks.
securityImplementation.solution: Conducted security audit, implemented firewall rules, established access controls, created security documentation, and trained staff on best practices.
securityImplementation.role: Security engineer - performed assessment, designed policies, configured infrastructure, and delivered training.
